programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of the Vampires
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal a long-lost village buried in a dense forest; archaeologists investigate and uncover a mysterious gravesite with the remains of decapitated skeletons and possible evidence of vampire burials.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Human+: The Future of Our Senses: Touch
programme.desc: We think of touch as resulting in a single sensation, but many thousands of nerve endings work in concert to create it. Managing to give bionic limbs a sense of touch is one of the latest successes of medical technology.

programme.title: Human+: The Future of Our Senses: Sight
programme.desc: The science of sight has entered a new era. We meet a blind rock climber who, using a sensory-substitution device, "sees" via vibrations on his tongue, as well as athletes who are winning with brain-training techniques that improve their visual acuity.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love and Dishonor
programme.desc: When Montreal teen Zainab Shafia meets Ammar Wahid, it's love at first sight. But their relationship is forbidden by her strict father and he'll stop at nothing to ensure his daughter obeys his rules of honor.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Who Killed the Councilman?
programme.desc: Matt Garcia, a popular young city councilman, is shot dead in Fairfield, California. Politicians and an anxious public demand answers. Drug dealers, political rivals, and even Matt's own father fall under suspicion.

programme.title: Diabolical: Sins of a Mother
programme.desc: In 1994, Lake Orion, Michigan is rocked by a vicious murder. At first, the crime is a mystery. But in a small town where everyone knows each other, rumors start flying. Soon, police expose a strange and twisted plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Who Killed Anna?
programme.desc: A 42-year-old Russian woman living the American dream in Texas is savagely gunned down in her garage. As investigators work the case, the list of suspects includes her controlling ex-husband, her boyfriend, an obsessive admirer, and a generous mentor.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Old Friends, Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: What starts as an idyllic relationship between neighbouring best friends and business partners takes a wrong turn and ends up in threats, restraining orders, litigation, and ultimately a triple homicide.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Lived A Double Life
programme.desc: Sonja Holt begins to suspect that her fiancé, Stafford Shaw, is living a secret double life. She can't imagine just how far he will go to keep everyone from finding out the truth about him or the terrible price that will be paid when his secrets collide.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Who Killed Anna?
programme.desc: A 42-year-old Russian woman living the American dream in Texas is savagely gunned down in her garage. As investigators work the case, the list of suspects includes her controlling ex-husband, her boyfriend, an obsessive admirer, and a generous mentor.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Old Friends, Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: What starts as an idyllic relationship between neighbouring best friends and business partners takes a wrong turn and ends up in threats, restraining orders, litigation, and ultimately a triple homicide.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Werewolf Butcher
programme.desc: When Jack 'Roy' Spillman started collecting wolf memorabilia, his sisters thought it was just an odd hobby. But when they learned of horrific things he had done, they realized some people may have been right when they called him 'more animal than human.'

programme.title: Diabolical: Killer Track Record
programme.desc: Three women die of the same mysterious illness, the hunt is on to prove their deaths are no accident. Investigators don't know that they are being played for fools by a sinister killer lurking undetected. There's only one woman who can bring him down.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Murder at the Drama Club
programme.desc: Deep in Louisiana bayou country, a man is found brutally murdered in a nightclub. A handwritten note soaked in the victim's blood reads: 'You gave me AIDS.' Police have more questions than answers. Was it a hate crime? Will the killer strike again?

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: An Inconvenient Murder
programme.desc: It is her Hollywood dream come true. A woman is in entangled with a brooding leading man and the son of a world-famous actor. After she is shot to death, investigators search for her killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Family Plot
programme.desc: Members of a Midwestern suburban family begin mysteriously dying off after weeks of flu-like symptoms. But after a third family member is hospitalized, authorities begin to believe something far more sinister is at work.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Where Is Baby DeOrr?
programme.desc: A young couple enjoys an impromptu camping trip in Leadore, Idaho, until their 2-year-old son suddenly vanishes. Investigators and private detectives work around the clock to find the missing boy, only to point the finger back at the parents.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Death Ride
programme.desc: A young mother's lifeless body is found floating deep in the Louisiana bayou and local police are stumped as to how she wound up dead nearly 300 miles from her Texas home. There is little physical evidence, and there are no eye-witnesses.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When 71-year-old Orville Head passes away, no one questions the death of an elderly man with health problems. But when a tip comes in suggesting foul play, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My Mysteries: Ho, Ho, Homicide
Disappeared: Gone In An Instant: Dangerous Liaisons
Disappeared: Into the Night
programme.desc: After a night at home watching movies, 18-year-old Zoe Campos cannot be found by her family the next morning. As investigators pore through the teen's Facebook account, they discover she did not turn in early as her loved ones originally thought.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: ABC News Correspondent Linzie Janis speaks exclusively to Nathan Carman about his rescue from the ill-fated fishing trip that claimed his mother Linda's life.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Who Killed Cathy?
programme.desc: When 20-year-old student Cathy Torrez is discovered dead in the trunk of her own car, her family won't rest until her killer is bought to justice. After breakthroughs in forensic technology years later, the truth behind who killed Cathy is revealed.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Maine Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Mike and Valerie Miller are a beloved couple in the tiny town of Webster Plantation, Maine. When they are found shot dead in their own home, authorities must probe a list of suspects that includes their own flesh and blood.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Cult of Personality
programme.desc: In 2014 a 911 call reports gunshots at the home of TV host Scott Rogers. As detectives work to piece together the events that led up to what looks like a murder-suicide, they soon discover a trail of lies from England all the way to Louisiana.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Second Shot
programme.desc: When Dianne Hood is gunned down outside a community center in Prison Valley, no one can understand why anyone would want to murder the well-liked housewife. The answer involves betrayal, greed and obsession, in an infamous love-triangle murder plot.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror

programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's About Time
programme.desc: A family that had to delay pool plans after building a new home is finally ready to make their backyard vision a reality.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean and Classic in Corona
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Corona, California, to help a big extended family that's running low on living space. They design a clean, geometrical pool with an artistic fountain wall, fire features and a killer barbecue area for everyone to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Desert Oasis in Sin City
programme.desc: Mike Baldasare and Jim Bellamy, two best friends that build award winning pools for clients all across the southwest, head to Las Vegas to build a dream pool for Shane and Willow Jager's brand new dream home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Game Time
programme.desc: After dealing with hot summers and limited options for swimming, a Tennessee father has decided it's time to get a pool of his own. The Pool Kings are up for the task and create a sports pool that will provide endless entertainment.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: This Hits the Spa
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Backyard or Water Park?
programme.desc: Why go on vacation when you have your own resort-worthy pool right in your own backyard?

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Tropical Twists
programme.desc: There's nothing like kicking back in the tropics.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke Chamber Of Commerce
programme.desc: The Dawgs save pieces from the Roanoke Chamber of Commerce, including safe deposit boxes and a pneumatic messaging system. The team also works on a large bar commissioned for the Natural Bridge Hotel.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Deck Fit For Fun
programme.desc: A couple's home in Parker, Colorado, needs a major deck overhaul to take advantage of the incredible views of the Rocky Mountains and downtown Denver. A huge budget allows the Mega Decks crew to design deck like no other.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Masterpiece
programme.desc: A mountain home in Conifer, Colorado, gets a $375K deck with a wall-sized stone fireplace, a hot tub that seats 12 and a grill kitchen. Jason's team is pitted against Mother Nature, however, when an icy road leads to a delivery truck crash.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Snake River Showpiece
programme.desc: Garth and his team brave sub-freezing temperatures in Idaho to build a $590k multi-level deck with four distinct living areas. The indoor-outdoor space features a pizza oven, a mezzanine-level bar overlooking the Snake River and an infrared sauna.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: All-New Deck for Repeat Client
programme.desc: A former Mega Decks customer buys a new house and needs a new deck. Find out if Andy and the build crew can live up to the client's heightened expectations and deliver a second mega deck that beats the first.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Log Cabin Luxe
programme.desc: To help this tiny deck achieve mega status, massive 40-foot-long Western red cedar logs are trucked in from Canada. The finished product has a three-tier pizza oven, a six-foot gas fire rail, and extra tall glass panels.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Renovation in South Florida
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach home to renovate on a budget in South Florida.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Beachfront or Bust in Myrtle Beach
programme.desc: Brad grew up spending summers in North Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. Now he's ready to find a vacation home for his family, and local broker Jason Moore is just the man to help them find it, along with some help from his wife and kids.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Backyard Beachside Blowout in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Full-on Fixer-Upper in St. Pete Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Steve and Stacie just moved to St. Pete Beach, Florida, and are looking to put down some roots. They find their perfect beachside home but it needs a ton of work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!
programme.desc: A young couple's new vacation home in Crystal Beach, Texas, requires a full gut, including a new kitchen, new bathrooms and a master suite. As walls are opened and floors are torn up, they realize their budget might not cover everything.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Bay Area
programme.desc: San Francisco proves that barbeque is not strictly southern, with the pork bun at Yank Sing.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Seattle
programme.desc: In Seattle, the crab cakes are so good it's an obsession, and you can find a seriously good slice of pizza at Serious Pie.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charlotte
programme.desc: Andrew explores Charlotte, NC, a city where big banking meets blue-collar traditions and is buzzing with amazing food. He zeroes in on barbecue, livermush, fried green tomatoes and other eats that are oozing Southern charm.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kyoto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the elaborate feasts, home-cooked comfort food, sushi and confections of Kyoto, Japan. From the artistic multi-course dining experience to the everyday humble comfort foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: Andrew tastes his way through the Chesapeake Bay area, trying creamy peanut soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew visits Seattle where the food scene is a contrast of high tech sophistication and rugged simplicity.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Houston: Blast and Cast
programme.desc: Andrew gets a taste of Texas-sized personality when he visits the vibrant city of Houston.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a bite of Chicago's humble, hearty and world-renowned food scene. From juicy rib tips to zesty Polish sausages to experimental and edible works of art, Chicago's eats stay true to its roots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Ozarks
programme.desc: Andrew visits the Ozarks where hunting and fishing are still a central way of life.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Patti Labelle's Place: Gayle King and Jay Manuel

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Three-foot-tall Fairy Cake
programme.desc: Michelle is producing a six-foot-long miniature steam train made out of cake; Eloise is tasked with creating a three-foot-tall fairy cake for a toddler's birthday; Karisha is commissioned to make a wedding cake with nearly 900 edible iced flowers.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Leather-Bound Cake
programme.desc: A cake that looks identical to four, legal-bound volumes for a publishing company; a cake that is the same shape and size of a Shetland pony; a wedding cake specialist creates a cake that is over two foot tall.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: A Glamping Wedding

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Snow In Dallas
programme.desc: Kirsten and Marcus are getting married in a few weeks, and are on the hunt for the perfect cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Basketball or Bach?
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Reid is about to celebrate his Bar Mitzvah. The party will include one hundred of Reid's closest friends and relatives. Mom and Reid's little sister Sloan want a cake that highlights Reid's talent for music.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Monopoly
programme.desc: Cake Wars celebrates the iconic board game, Monopoly. Four bakers will roll the dice before the judges and hope to have their cake be the centerpiece at a party celebrating everyone's favorite board game.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Happy Feet

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Bollywood Bake-Off

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcake Champions: Spider-Man: Turn Off the Dark
programme.desc: Four returning bakers will compete against each other for the chance to serve their super hero cupcakes at a VIP party for the most talked about show on Broadway, Spider-Man: Turn off the Dark.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lock 'N Loud/ The Whole Picture
programme.desc: Dad gets upset with the kids for never locking the front door; Lincoln accidentally erases his childhood photos.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fool's Paradise/ Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan away at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they should be safe. The kids discover Dad isn't at his old job anymore and worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: The Loud House: House of Lies/ Game Boys
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs. Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: The Loud House: Back Out There/ Spell It Out
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, tries to cure his post-breakup blues.Tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book once to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: The Loud House: Picture Perfect/ Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Mission: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Bobby visit their crazy, chaotic extended family. Bobby fits in great but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives. Little do they know, their mother has a secret motive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Keep Bikini Bottom Beautiful/ A Pal for Gary
programme.desc: Squidward cleans up the city of Bikini Bottom with 'help' from SpongeBob. SpongeBob brings Gary a pet that terrorizes him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg/ Rock a Bye Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes paranoid; Patrick finds a baby clam and decides to rear it as his own.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sister Act/ Lil' T
programme.desc: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers. When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sick As A Chipmunk/ Instant Gram
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The App/ Don Juan Theodoro
programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise the Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control. Alvin, Simon, and the Chipettes give Theodore conflicting dating tips when they believe he has a crush on a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Adventures in Babysitting/ Alvin's Assistant
programme.desc: Theodore gets roped into doing Alvin's babysitting job with a spoiled four year old. Kevin agrees to be Alvin's assistant to get closer to the music industry, but ends up running errands instead.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: The group arrives at the witch’s castle for an epic battle of swords and spells, and a surprise admission from Stacey that shocks her father.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Odd Fairy Tales
programme.desc: In order to put a restless Poof to sleep, Wanda decides to read him a book of fairy tales.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Man's Worst Friend
programme.desc: In order to make Timmy and his family miserable, Foop replaces Sparky with the Anti-Sparky. When that plan works, Foop decides to make all of Dimmsdale unhappy be replacing everyone's pet with an evil pet.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Big Fairy Share Scare
programme.desc: Timmy finds out that he has to share his fairies with the new girl in school, Chloe Carmichael. But when Chloe realizes she can use her magic for good, she wishes everyone in Dimmsdale would share everything, and chaos ensues.

programme.title: Danger Force: Test Friends
programme.desc: Without them knowing, Captain Man puts Danger Force through a series of tests to see if he can trust them. But when the tests get out of hand, the tables turn on who can be trusted.

programme.title: Danger Force: Radioactive Cat
programme.desc: Bose's Mom, Celia, picks up Schwoz's lost radioactive cat from outside SW.A.G. and takes it home, so Danger Force and Captain Man have to try and get it back before she goes nuclear.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Trend Game/ This Bird Has Flown
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

programme.title: The Loud House: Out of the Picture/ Room With a Feud
programme.desc: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Laughing Matter/ No Spoilers
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: The Honorable Ones
programme.desc: Zeb and Agent Kallus find themselves stranded on an ice planet after a failed Imperial ambush. With Kallus injured from the escape pod crash, he and Zeb must work together to survive the harsh conditions.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Shroud of Darkness
programme.desc: Kanan, Ezra and Ahsoka return to the Jedi Temple on Lothal, seeking answers from Yoda about the Inquisitors' ability to continually track the rebels.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What a Croc!/ Ferb TV
programme.desc: When the boys learn that the famous Crikey the Crocodile has gone missing, they set out to find and return him to his home at the Danville Nature Preserve.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Quietest Day Ever/ Bully Bromance Breakup
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create ninja outfits that make themselves invisible to anyone not wearing one.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bee Day/ Bee Story
programme.desc: Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter named Liam set out on destroying him. He must find a way to defeat this foe, rescue Doofenshmirtz from the error of his ways and save himself.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: World's Best Mom
programme.desc: Jack tries his hand at parenting in Mother Simulator, Crank gets hired in Job Simulator, and Markiplier takes a road trip in Clustertruck.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Take Me Down to The Donut County
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's No Picnic/ Steampunx
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Terrifying Tri-State Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: In the first tale, Buford breaks a rule that turns Perry into an evil facsimile. Tale two tells of Doofenshmirtz’s encounter with a floating baby head that grants cursed wishes.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Deal/ Forbidden Feline
programme.desc: Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Last Stall on the Left/ Got Stank
programme.desc: Armed with his magic ninja suit, Randy faces his first battle with McFist's monster, Krakenstein.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Gossip Boy/ Tale of the Golden Doctor's Note
programme.desc: Ninja must rescue Howard, captured by McFist, before his secret identity is revealed.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: House of 1,000 Boogers/ Attack of the Killer Potatoes
programme.desc: Randy and Howard crash Bash's big party, only to discover it's a plot to unmask the Ninja.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Monster Dump/ So You Think You Can Stank
programme.desc: Randy must put on his ninja suit to save his classmates after a field trip to the town volcano goes horribly awry.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: 30 Seconds to Math/ Monster Drill
programme.desc: Randy and Howard realize they should have paid more attention in Spanish class.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Dawn of the Driscol/ Night of the Living McFizzles
programme.desc: Randy misuses the NinjaNomicon and accidentally brings the skeleton of a mad scientist back to life. Also, something is turning everyone in town into zombies.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: McFists of Fury/ Viva El Nomicon
programme.desc: When a Mexican Death Bear runs amok at school, Randy and Howard realize they should have paid more attention during Spanish class.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Silent Punch, Deadly Punch/ Ninja Camp
programme.desc: Randy runs out of smoke bombs and tries to make more; Randy must stop a ninja army.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Stank'd to the Future/ Wave Slayers
programme.desc: A frozen student from the 1980s is turned into a crazy monster by the Sorcerer.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Sword Quest/ Nukid on the Block
programme.desc: Franz, a new exchange student, threatens to destroy the Ninja and friendships too.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Weinerman Up/ Evil Spirit Week
programme.desc: When Randy and Howard's video game battle gets out of hand, the Ninja must save the town from a giant robot.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Der Monster Klub/ Grave Puncher: The Movie
programme.desc: When Randy and Howard are forced to share a lunch table with the outcast group 'Der Monster Klub,' they realize these oddballs are playing a dangerous game that could destroy the whole school.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: The Blading Revolution!
Phineas and Ferb: Out of Toon/ Hail Doofania!

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: The Mystery of Chopper Base
programme.desc: Kanan, Ezra and Ahsoka prepare to depart to unravel Vader's secret, while the rebels find a way to fend off the predatory creatures that occupy the planet.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Crystal is suing Pamela for 43 months of storage space, but Pamela says she never agreed to pay for storage. Then, Dana is suing James over a botched pool installment, but James said Dana didn't give her a chance to fix the pool.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Are You Allowing Men to Have Sex With Your Daughter for Money?
programme.desc: Paris says two weeks ago police and child services came to her door to investigate as she was being accused of allowing men to rape her young daughter for money. She was also accused of splitting the money with her mother, Rhoda.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Eye Opening Secrets
programme.desc: Tiny's secret could complicate things with his girlfriend Tigest and mistress Breaa. Ricky's shocked by his girlfriend Z's pregnancy and has been sleeping with her friend Karissa. Ted cheated on Samantha but blames it on 'sexsomnia'.

programme.title: Maury: Stop Lying to My Son ... We Both Know That's Not His Baby!
programme.desc: Treven and Katana are back as Treven has doubts he's the father of Katana's baby. John and his mom Patricia are denying that John is the father of Iyanna's daughter, and Patricia says she’s say Iyanna visiting another man light at night.
